member.name: F:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.PropagationDirection.BothWays
member.summary: Update will go both ways, from high to low and low to high.

member.name: F:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.PropagationDirection.HighToLow
member.summary: Update will only go from High Level to Low Level structures. If low Level structure is disabled, it will not disabled high level structure.

member.name: F:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.PropagationDirection.LowToHigh
member.summary: Update will only go from Low Level to High Level structures. If high Level structure is disabled, it will not disabled low level structure.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Dependency
member.summary: This class will hold the dependencies per JSON input file.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Dependency.HighLevelStructure
member.summary: Gets or sets the structureName for the highLevelStructure.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Dependency.HighLevelElement
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the dependent element to consider from the highLevelStructure.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Dependency.LowLevelStructure
member.summary: Gets or sets the structureName for the lowLevelStructure.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Dependency.LowLevelElements
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the dependent elements to consider from the lowLevelStructure.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Dependency.Propagation
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction of data propagation.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.IRule`1
member.summary: Rule Interface.
member.typeparam: The type being expected out of the rule.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.IRule`1.ResolveValue
member.summary: Resolve the value of rule.
member.returns: The resolved value of the rule.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.IRule`1.EnforceExistence
member.summary: Check if the value of the rule is UserVar typed, if it is make sure the UserVar exists.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.MinQuantityRule
member.summary: This class will hold Minimum Quantity configurations for rule per JSON input file and resolve the effective value.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.MinQuantityRule.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.MinQuantityRule.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Rule
member.summary: This class will hold the rule configuration per JSON input file.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Rule.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Rule.SingleFail
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Rule.MinQuantity
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Rule.ValidCombination
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.SingleFailRule
member.summary: This class will hold Single-Fail configurations for rule per JSON input file and resolve the effective value.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.SingleFailRule.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.SingleFailRule.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.SingleFailRule.ValidateRule
member.summary: Validate contents in the rule.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration
member.summary: The class to hold the tracking configuration defined in the input file.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration.Schema
member.summary: Gets or sets the schema.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration.Elements
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of elements defined in the input file.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration.TrackingStructures
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of tracking structures defined in the input file.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration.ValidCombinations
member.summary: Gets or sets the Valid combinations from the input file.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration.Rules
member.summary: Gets or sets the rules from the input file.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration.Dependencies
member.summary: Gets or sets the dependencies defined in the input file.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureGroup
member.summary: This class will only hold structure configuration per JSON input files.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureGroup.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureGroup.TrackingElements
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.TrackingStructure
member.summary: This class will only hold structure configuration per JSON input files.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.TrackingStructure.StructureNames
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.TrackingStructure.StructureGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.TrackingStructure.IntraStructureLinks
member.summary: Gets or sets the IntraStructure Linkings. Each HashSet contains the group that they are linked together.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Validator
member.summary: Class object to validate the configuration from file.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Validator.#ctor(Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.StructureConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The configuration parsed from input file to be validated.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombination
member.summary: This class will hold Valid Combination vectors per JSON input files.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombination.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombination.Vector
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombination.MinQuantityPerCombination
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombinationRule
member.summary: This class will hold Valid Combination configurations for rule per JSON input file and resolve the effective value.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombinationRule.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombinationRule.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombinationRule.Combos
member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable
member.summary: Table the holds the element value record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Only for SharedStorage usage.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Name of the element.
StructureName the element comes from.
The group that the element comes from.
The value of the element.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the element.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable.StructureName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the structure this element belongs to.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable.GroupName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the group this structure belongs to.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable.CurrentValue
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the element's currently defeatured or not. True = Defeatured/Disabled. False = Not-Defeatured/Enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.ElementRecordTable.OriginalValue
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the element's originally defeatured or not. True = Defeatured/Disabled. False = Not-Defeatured/Enabled.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler
member.summary: Interfaces to be used along with DependencyMap.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.GetStructureName
member.summary: Get the name of the structure. Only intended to be used along with DependencyMap.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.InitializeElementValues(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initialize the given value into the Tracking Structure for the specified elements. The number of element values given must match the size of the Tracking Structure. Only intended to be used along with DependencyMap.
member.param: The names of the element to initialize.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.HasBeenInitalized
member.summary: Get the information whether this structure has been initialized or not. Only intended to be used along with DependencyMap.
member.returns: True if the structure has been initialized.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.UpdateElementValue(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Update specific element and specify the origin structure. Only intended to be used along with DependencyMap as part of the dependency elements data propagation.
member.param: The name of the element to initialize.
The value of the element to update.
The structure where this API is called from. This value is important to avoid infinity loop.
Determines if proximities should be updated. During init flow, this should be false.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.GetAllElementsValue
member.summary: Get all elements paired with their values. Only intended to be used along with DependencyMap.
member.returns: Dictionary of element names and values.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.ResetLastValuesBeforeUpdate
member.summary: Reset the values before update, to be used after writing to ituff so that the next ituff print will be correct.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.GetItuffFormatter(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get all the ituff formatter for the dependency structures. Intended to be used with DependencyMap.
member.param: List of structures that has already been gathered, so it doesn't give duplicates.
To print structure (class) format, or group format (sort).

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.Internal.IDependencyStructureHandler.EvaluateRule(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Rules.IDefeatureRule}},System.String)
member.summary: Evaluate the Dependency Structure's against their specified rul. Intended to be used with DependencyMap.
member.param: List of structures that has already been gathered, so it doesn't give duplicates.
The list of rules to be applied to the dependencies.
Where this function is being called from.
member.returns: True if the value does not violate any rules.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureTable
member.summary: Table for structure. Structure name is the key.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureTable.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Only for SharedStorage usage.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureTable.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Element of the group.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureTable.Elements
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of elements in the group structure.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureHierarchy
member.summary: The structure hierarchy.

member.name: F:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureHierarchy.High
member.summary: High level structure, highest in the hierarchy.

member.name: F:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureHierarchy.Intermediate
member.summary: Intermediate level structure, it's in the middle and it has a structure on top of it and below it.

member.name: F:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.StructureHierarchy.Low
member.summary: Low level structure, lowest in the hierarchy.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase
member.summary: Handles the tracking database.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.StructureName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the structure that this tracking database is for.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.StructureElements
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of elements for the whole structure.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.StructureTable
member.summary: Gets or sets StructureTable, table is keyed with the structure group name.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.ElementRecordTable
member.summary: Gets or sets Element Record Table, table is keyed with element name.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.IntraStructureLinks
member.summary: Gets or sets the IntraStructure Linkings. Each HashSet contains the group that they are linked together.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.HigherProximityStructures
member.summary: Gets or sets the higher proximity linked structures. Structures under this property comes before current database. A -> B, If current level is B, A is under this property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.LowerProximityStructures
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower proximity linked structures. Structures under this property comes after current database. A -> B, if current level is A, B is under this property.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.HaveOriginalValuesBeenSet
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the originalValues are yet to be initialized.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.HasBeenInitializedThroughDependency
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the dependent structure has been initialized.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.LastCombinationResult
member.summary: Gets or sets last combination result.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase.LastValuesBeforeUpdate
member.summary: Gets the last value before an update happen after WriteToItuff happened. This value will be set to be equal to current values after WriteToItuff happened. Before update = 01000 -> Update to 01001 -> WriteToItuff called -> Before update = 01001.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.DefeatureTrackingService
member.summary: DefeatureTrackingService implementation class. Partial class for SDK.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.DefeatureTrackingService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.FileHandler.Parser
member.summary: Class for DefeatureTrackingParser.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.FileHandler.Parser.ParseConfigFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads configuration from file.
member.param: The content of the file.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions
member.summary: Extending the BitArray functionality.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.ConvertToString(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Convert BitArray to binary string sequence.
member.param: The bits to be converted.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.AreEquals(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Check whether the bitarrays are equal by value.
member.param: LeftSide of comparison.
RightSide of comparison.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.HasNewTrueBit(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Check if there's new bit flipped from false to true. The execution will ignore if the bit from referenceValue is already true.
member.param: BitArray value from user.
BitArray value used as reference.
member.returns: True if there's no new bit flipped.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.BitArrayExtensions.ConvertToBitArray(System.String)
member.summary: Convert binary string sequence to BitArray.
member.param: The binary string.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper
member.summary: Helper to print out debug messages for debug use.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintDebugMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Print debug message. Outside of "DEBUG" configuration, this is a do nothing method.
member.param: The debug message to print.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintAllElements(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Print list of all elements. Outside of "DEBUG" configuration, this is a do nothing method.
member.param: The list of elements to print.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintTrackingStructure(Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.TrackingStructure)
member.summary: Print list of all elements. Outside of "DEBUG" configuration, this is a do nothing method.
member.param: Structure to print.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintDatabase(Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase,Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Storage.DynamicRecordStorageHandler)
member.summary: Print database informations.
member.param: The database to be printed.
The storage handler objet to read the database from for dependency printouts.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintContainer(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Print list informations.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintContainer``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Print list informations.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintDebugToConsole(System.String)
member.summary: Print to system console. The message will appear in HdmtApp.exe window or UnitTest Standard Output in the summary.
member.param: The debug message to print.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.DebugMessageHelper.PrintDebugToTosConsole(System.String)
member.summary: Print to TOS console. The message will appear in TOS Console GUI or console log file.
member.param: The debug message to print.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.RuleHelpers
member.summary: Class for common rule implementation.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Helpers.RuleHelpers.IsUserVarType(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the type is a uservar type.
member.param: Input type.
member.returns: True if input type is uservar.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.IDefeatureTrackingService
member.summary: Interface to the Defeature Tracking Service which can grant access to a Tracking Structure Handler.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.IDefeatureTrackingService.CreateTrackingStructureHandler(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns an interface to a Tracking Service Handler which gives access to data operations unto a specific tracking structure.
member.param: The name of the tracking structure for which a handler is needed.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: Tracking configuration cannot be obtained, usually because it is not loaded through Aleph.
The specified structure name does not exists in the configuration file.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
var trackingStructureHandler = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IDefeatureTrackingService>.Service.CreateTrackingStructureHandler("Struct0", this.SessionContext);

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.IDefeatureTrackingService.CreateTrackingStructureGroupHandler(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returns an interface to a Tracking Structure Group Handler which gives access to data operations unto a specific tracking structure.
member.param: The name of the tracking structure for which a handler is needed.
The name of the structure element name for which the handler is needed.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: Tracking configuration cannot be obtained, usually because it is not loaded through Aleph.
The specified structure name does not exists in the configuration file.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
var trackingStructureHandler = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IDefeatureTrackingService>.Service.CreateTrackingStructureGroupHandler("Struct0", "Group0", this.SessionContext);

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.IDefeatureTrackingService.DoesRuleExists(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check whether the specified rule does exists in Defeature Tracking configuration or not.
member.param: The name of the rule to be checked.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: True if rule does indeed exists in the configuration, false if otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler
member.summary: Interface for TrackingStructureHandler.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.InitializeElementValues(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Initialize the given values into the Tracking Structure. The number of element values given must match the size of the Tracking Structure. The MSB will be stored into the first element and the LSB will be stored into the last element of the tracking structure as defined in the Defeature Tracking Configuration File.
member.param: The values to initialize.
member.exception: Values does not match the number of elements defined in the tracking structure.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.UpdateElementValue(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Update a value into the specified element of the tracking structure.
member.param: The name of the element unto which the value will be updated.
The value to update.
member.exception: Element name is not in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.UpdateElementValueWithItuffPrint(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Update a value into the specified element of the tracking structure.
member.param: The name of the element unto which the value will be updated.
The value to update.
member.exception: Element name is not in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.UpdateElementValues(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Update the given values into the Tracking Structure. The number of element values given must match the size of the Tracking Structure. The MSB will be stored into the first element and the LSB will be stored into the last element of the tracking structure as defined in the Defeature Tracking Configuration File.
member.param: The values to initialize.
member.exception: Values does not match the number of elements defined in the tracking structure.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.UpdateElementValuesWithItuffPrint(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Update a value into the specified element of the tracking structure.
member.param: The values to initialize.
member.exception: Element name is not in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.UpdateElementValueWithStructureItuffPrint(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Update a value into the specified element of the tracking structure. This interface will print to ituff using SORT ituff format, with no tssid and per structure printing.
member.param: The name of the element unto which the value will be updated.
The value to update.
member.exception: Element name is not in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.UpdateElementValuesWithStructureItuffPrint(System.Collections.BitArray)
member.summary: Update a value into the specified element of the tracking structure. This interface will print to ituff using SORT ituff format, with no tssid and per structure printing.
member.param: The values to initialize.
member.exception: Element name is not in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.ReadElementValue(System.String)
member.summary: Reads current value from the specified element of the Tracking Structure.
member.param: The name of the element from which the value will be read.
member.returns: The boolean value read from the element.
member.exception: Element name is not in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.ReadElementValues
member.summary: Reads current values from the Tracking Structure. The MSB will match the value of the first element and the LSB will match the one from the last element of the tracking structure as defined in the Defeature Tracking Configuration File.
member.returns: A bit array containing the values of the tracking structure elements.
member.exception: There's any element name in the database cannot be found in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.ReadOriginalElementValue(System.String)
member.summary: Reads original values (as initialized) from Tracking Structure.
member.param: The name of the element from which the value will be read.
member.returns: The original boolean value (as initialized) read from the element.
member.exception: Element name is not in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.ReadOriginalElementValues
member.summary: Reads original values (as initialized) from Tracking Structure. The MSB will match the value of the first element and the LSB will match the one from the last element of the tracking structure as defined in the Defeature Tracking Configuration File.
member.returns: A bit array containing the original values (as initialized) of the tracking structure elements.
member.exception: There's any element name in the database cannot be found in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.PopulateRule(System.String)
member.summary: Populate the rule to the tracking handler to be used for rule evaluation against the structure.
member.param: The rule name. Must exists and defined in the input file.
member.exception: Specified rule does not exists in config file.
Rule does not contain the correct number of elements for the structure.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.PopulateRuleForDependent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Populate the rule to the dependent structure handler to be used for rule evaluation against the structure.
member.param: The name of the dependent structure name. The structure must exists as dependent of this structure.
The rule name, must exists and defined in the input file.
member.exception: Specified structure does not exists as dependent of this structure in config file.
Specified rule does not exists in config file.
Rule does not contain the correct number of elements for the structure.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.EvaluateRule(System.Collections.BitArray,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Evaluate the value of the structure against the rules populated in the structure.
member.param: The value to be evaluated against the rules.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: True if the value complies with the rule.
member.exception: There's any element name in the database cannot be found in the record.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.GetElementCount
member.summary: Get the element count in the tracking structure.
member.returns: Return the number of the element inside the structure.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ITrackingStructureHandler.GetPerStructureEvaluation
member.summary: Gets the last evaluated combination result of the structure. Will be null if no previously executed combination rule is done.
member.returns: Result if found, null if not found.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Rules.DefeatureRule
member.summary: This class holds the effective rule to be used for evaluation.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Rules.DefeatureRule.#ctor(Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.Rule,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.ConfigFiles.ValidCombination},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The rule from input file.
The list of the valid combinations vectors from the input file.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Rules.IDefeatureRule
member.summary: Interface for DefeatureRule.

member.name: P:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Rules.IDefeatureRule.RuleName
member.summary: Gets the rule name.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Rules.IDefeatureRule.ValidateRuleConfiguration(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validate the selected rule for the rules that cannot be validated at config file level e.g UserVar values.
member.param: Number of elements in the tracking structure.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Rules.IDefeatureRule.EvaluateRule(System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray,System.Collections.BitArray@)
member.summary: Evaluate the value from user against all of the populated rule.
member.param: BitArray values from user to be validated against the rule.
BitArray values from tracking structure.
Valid combination result. Null if no combination was ran.
member.returns: True if the value does not offend any rules.

member.summary: The class will hold the valid combination vectors in string format.

member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.summary: Gets or sets the property.

member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Store current tracking values into SharedStorage.
member.param: The tracking database to store into sharedstorage.

member.summary: Retrieve tracking values from SharedStorage.
member.param: The name of the structure whose record is to be retrieved.

member.summary: Check if the database for the structure is already exists.
member.param: The name of the structure.

member.name: M:Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Storage.DynamicRecordStorageHandler.TryGetDatabase(System.String,Prime.DefeatureTrackingService.Database.TrackingDatabase@)
member.summary: Check if database exists, and if it is get it from SharedStorage.
member.param: The name of the structure.
Record of the structure.

The name of the element.
